features.title: --access-log
features.description: Enable access logging for the selected runtime profile.

features.title: --activate
features.description: Mark a generated or imported key active immediately.

features.title: --baseline-file
features.description: Optional explicit baseline artifact for diff operations.

features.title: --check
features.description: Validate the selected runner profile and application factory without launching runtime.

features.title: --checksum
features.description: Expected checksum or checksum algorithm for import/export validation.

features.title: --cookies
features.description: Enable cookie/session helpers in serve plans.

features.title: --db-safe-start
features.description: Require a safe database start posture.

features.title: --dry-run
features.description: Resolve and emit the runtime plan without applying or launching state changes.

features.title: --enable-mtls
features.description: Enable mTLS slice for the serve plan.

features.title: --env-file
features.description: Optional environment file loaded before resolution.

features.title: --extension
features.description: Extension boundary slice. May be supplied multiple times.

features.title: --filter
features.description: Simple substring filter applied to identifiers or names.

features.title: --from-file
features.description: Load mutation input from a JSON or YAML file.

features.title: --health
features.description: Enable health endpoints in serve plans.

features.title: --id
features.description: Primary identifier for a single record.

features.title: --if-exists
features.description: Behavior when the target already exists.

features.title: --if-missing
features.description: Behavior when the target does not already exist.

features.title: --include-secrets
features.description: Include secret material where the selected surface permits it.

features.title: --input
features.description: Input path for import, validation, or diff operations.

features.title: --issuer
features.description: Issuer override for discovery and contract generation.

features.title: --limit
features.description: Maximum number of results to return.

features.title: --log-level
features.description: Operator log level for serve plans.

features.title: --name
features.description: Optional named release gate or artifact selector.

features.title: --no-strict
features.description: Downgrade failures to warnings for exploratory use.

features.title: --offline
features.description: Avoid network or external peer execution assumptions.

features.title: --peer-profile
features.description: Peer profile selector. May be supplied multiple times.

features.title: --pid-file
features.description: Optional PID file written for the launched runtime.

features.title: --publish
features.description: Publish JWKS after a successful key mutation.

features.title: --redact
features.description: Redact secret material from exported output.

features.title: --require-tls
features.description: Require TLS on the public plane.

features.title: --retire-after
features.description: Retire-after hint or timestamp recorded with the key.

features.title: --runtime-style
features.description: Runtime style for installation or standalone serving.

features.title: --server
features.description: Runner profile used to qualify and launch runtime.

features.title: --set
features.description: Inline mutation field assignment in key=value form. May be supplied multiple times.

features.title: --signing-key
features.description: Optional Ed25519 private signing key path or seed.

features.title: --slice
features.description: Protocol slice. May be supplied multiple times.

features.title: --strict
features.description: Fail closed when governance or certification checks fail.

features.title: --surface-set
features.description: Installable surface set. May be supplied multiple times.

features.title: --timeout
features.description: Maximum wait time in seconds for supported long-running operations.

features.title: --verbose, -v
features.description: Increase operator verbosity; may be repeated.

features.title: --wait
features.description: Wait for completion when the operation supports asynchronous execution.

features.title: --workers
features.description: Process count for the selected runtime profile.

features.title: adr index
features.description: Generate the ADR index markdown and JSON summaries.

features.title: adr new
features.description: Create a new ADR markdown document from a template.

features.title: bootstrap apply
features.description: Materialize bootstrap manifests and record an applied bootstrap checkpoint.

features.title: bootstrap manifest
features.description: Write deployment, claims, evidence, and contract manifests for the selected profile.

features.title: bootstrap status
features.description: Summarize bootstrap readiness for the selected profile and surfaces.

features.title: bootstrap verify
features.description: Verify bootstrap manifests, effective artifacts, and applied checkpoint state.

features.title: claims lint
features.description: Validate declared claims against mappings and boundaries.

features.title: claims show
features.description: Materialize the effective claims manifest for the active deployment.

features.title: claims status
features.description: Summarize declared, effective, and promotable claims.

features.title: client create
features.description: Create a durable operator-plane client record.

features.title: client delete
features.description: Delete a durable operator-plane client record.

features.title: client get
features.description: Return a single durable operator-plane client record.

features.title: client rotate-secret
features.description: Rotate durable operator-plane client secret material.

features.title: client update
features.description: Update a durable operator-plane client record.

features.title: discovery diff
features.description: Diff active discovery metadata against a provided or published baseline.

features.title: discovery publish
features.description: Publish discovery metadata into a release-ready output directory.

features.title: discovery show
features.description: Show the active discovery snapshot for the selected profile.

features.title: discovery validate
features.description: Validate discovery metadata and supporting contracts.

features.title: doctor
features.description: Aggregate core verification, runtime profile, contracts, evidence, and gate status.

features.title: evidence bundle
features.description: Build a release/evidence bundle filtered by the effective deployment.

features.title: evidence peer-execute
features.description: Materialize peer execution manifests for configured profiles.

features.title: evidence peer-status
features.description: Summarize configured peer execution profiles and bundle refs.

features.title: export run
features.description: Export durable operator-plane state to a portable artifact.

features.title: export status
features.description: Show the last durable operator-plane export status.

features.title: export validate
features.description: Validate export configuration and current operator state.

features.title: flow create
features.description: Create a durable operator-plane flow record.

features.title: flow delete
features.description: Delete a durable operator-plane flow record.

features.title: flow get
features.description: Return a single durable operator-plane flow record.

features.title: flow update
features.description: Update a durable operator-plane flow record.

features.title: gate
features.description: Run one release gate or the full ordered release gate catalog.

features.title: identity create
features.description: Create a durable operator-plane identity record.

features.title: identity delete
features.description: Delete a durable operator-plane identity record.

features.title: identity get
features.description: Return a single durable operator-plane identity record.

features.title: identity set-password
features.description: Set or rotate a durable operator-plane identity password hash.

features.title: identity update
features.description: Update a durable operator-plane identity record.

features.title: import run
features.description: Import durable operator-plane state from a portable artifact.

features.title: import status
features.description: Show the last durable operator-plane import status.

features.title: import validate
features.description: Validate an import artifact without mutating state.

features.title: keys delete
features.description: Delete a durable operator-plane key record.

features.title: keys export
features.description: Export durable operator-plane key metadata to a JSON or YAML file.

features.title: keys generate
features.description: Generate durable operator-plane key metadata and optional JWKS publication.

features.title: keys get
features.description: Return a single durable operator-plane key record.

features.title: keys import
features.description: Import durable operator-plane key metadata from a JSON or YAML file.

features.title: keys publish-jwks
features.description: Publish the current durable operator-plane JWKS document.

features.title: keys retire
features.description: Mark a durable operator-plane key retired.

features.title: keys rotate
features.description: Generate successor key metadata and retire the previous active key.

features.title: migrate apply
features.description: Record a migration application checkpoint for the structured plan.

features.title: migrate plan
features.description: Emit the structured migration plan and replacement order.

features.title: migrate status
features.description: List migration revisions and current-to-target move status.

features.title: release bundle
features.description: Build a release bundle containing claims, evidence, contracts, ADR index, and peer refs.

features.title: release recertify
features.description: Re-run recertification for Tigrbl and standards-boundary changes.

features.title: release sign
features.description: Create externally verifiable Ed25519 attestations for an existing release bundle.

features.title: release status
features.description: Summarize the current release bundle and release-gate posture.

features.title: release verify
features.description: Verify release-bundle attestations and manifest integrity for an existing signed bundle.

features.title: serve
features.description: Resolve deployment, materialize a runner-qualified runtime plan, validate the selected profile, and optionally launch runtime.

features.title: session get
features.description: Return a single durable operator-plane session record.

features.title: session revoke
features.description: Mark a durable operator-plane session revoked.

features.title: session revoke-all
features.description: Mark all durable operator-plane sessions revoked.

features.title: spec diff
features.description: Regenerate contracts and compare them to committed artifacts.

features.title: spec generate
features.description: Generate OpenAPI/OpenRPC artifacts for the selected deployment.

features.title: spec report
features.description: Summarize active contract contents and profile coverage.

features.title: spec validate
features.description: Validate generated contracts against repository expectations.

features.title: tenant create
features.description: Create a durable operator-plane tenant record.

features.title: tenant delete
features.description: Delete a durable operator-plane tenant record.

features.title: tenant get
features.description: Return a single durable operator-plane tenant record.

features.title: tenant update
features.description: Update a durable operator-plane tenant record.

features.title: token exchange
features.description: Create a derived durable operator-plane token exchange record.

features.title: token get
features.description: Return a single durable operator-plane token record.

features.title: token introspect
features.description: Return active/revoked status and metadata for a token record.

features.title: token revoke
features.description: Mark a durable operator-plane token revoked.

features.title: verify
features.description: Execute one or more verification scopes and emit structured results.

features.title: claims.lint
features.description: Run claims lint against the governance plane.

features.title: claims.show
features.description: Return effective claims for the active deployment profile.

features.title: client.list
features.description: List OAuth/OIDC clients in the admin plane.

features.title: client.registration.upsert
features.description: Create or update a durable client-registration record.

features.title: client.show
features.description: Show a client in the admin plane.

features.title: discovery.show
features.description: Show effective OIDC discovery metadata for the deployment.

features.title: flow.list
features.description: List effective protocol flow slices for the current deployment.

features.title: identity.list
features.description: List identities in the admin plane.

features.title: identity.show
features.description: Show an identity in the admin plane.

features.title: keys.list
features.description: List durable service keys and key-rotation history.

features.title: keys.rotate
features.description: Rotate the signing key and persist a key-rotation event.

features.title: rpc.discover
features.description: Return the active implementation-backed RPC method catalog.

features.title: session.list
features.description: List durable browser and auth sessions.

features.title: session.show
features.description: Show a durable session and its latest logout state.

features.title: session.terminate
features.description: Terminate a durable session and persist logout state.

features.title: tenant.list
features.description: List tenants in the admin plane.

features.title: tenant.show
features.description: Show a tenant in the admin plane.

features.title: token.exchange
features.description: Create a durable token exchange record.

features.title: token.inspect
features.description: Inspect token posture and current introspection state.

features.title: baseline
features.description: Minimum interoperable OAuth 2.0 / OIDC / JOSE server profile.

features.title: camara-security-interoperability
features.description: External tracked profile for CAMARA Security and Interoperability.

features.title: confidential-spa-pattern
features.description: External tracked profile for confidential SPA security pattern.

features.title: fapi2-message-signing
features.description: External tracked profile for FAPI 2.0 Message Signing.

features.description: FAPI 2.0 security profile with hardened request channels, sender-constrained tokens, and issuer-aware authorization responses.

features.description: Advanced hardening and interop profile for sender-constrained tokens and hardened request channels.

features.description: External tracked profile for NIST SP 800-63B-4.

features.description: External tracked profile for NIST SP 800-63C-4.

features.description: Production-ready authn/z profile with lifecycle, browser, and registration surfaces.

features.title: SSOT work item traceability
features.description: Release-impacting GitHub issues and pull requests are mirrored into SSOT and linked to governed work.

features.title: Dependency compatibility maintenance
features.description: Runtime and test dependency changes are modeled as governed compatibility work with explicit repository traceability.

features.title: SSOT document authority
features.description: Document authority for current release truth is defined in SSOT and projected into compliance docs.

claims.title: FAPI 2.0 Security profile requires issuer identification
claims.description: Authorization responses and discovery metadata must remain issuer-aware.

claims.title: FAPI 2.0 Security profile requires JAR
claims.description: JWT-secured authorization requests are part of the first-class FAPI 2.0 security posture.

claims.title: FAPI 2.0 Security profile requires PAR
claims.description: Pushed authorization requests are part of the first-class FAPI 2.0 security posture.

claims.title: FAPI 2.0 Security profile requires RAR
claims.description: Rich authorization requests are part of the first-class FAPI 2.0 security posture.

claims.title: FAPI 2.0 Security profile requires security BCP posture
claims.description: The profile inherits the hardened security recommendations already tracked in the repo.

claims.title: FAPI 2.0 Security profile requires sender-constrained tokens
claims.description: Sender constraint support is modeled through the hardening token posture.

claims.description: Minimum interoperable OAuth 2.0 / OIDC / JOSE server profile.

claims.title: SSOT work item traceability
claims.description: Release-impacting GitHub issues and pull requests are mirrored into SSOT and linked to affected governed work.

claims.title: Dependency compatibility maintenance
claims.description: Runtime and test dependency changes are tracked as governed compatibility work with explicit test coverage.

claims.title: SSOT document authority
claims.description: SSOT defines document authority for current release truth and derived projections cannot redefine it independently.

adrs.title: Canonical registry is a single JSON document
Features are the targetable units
Issues are plannable work items
Entity-centric registry with a derived graph export
Normalized prefixed IDs
Claim status and claim tier are orthogonal
Feature implementation state is separate from lifecycle state
Immutable boundary and release snapshots
Fail-closed guards
Generated projections are non-canonical
Explicit schema versioning
Portable SSOT core with repo-specific evidence adapters
Enforce max path and filename lengths under `.ssot`
Profiles are reusable feature bundles with derived pass status
Use ADRs for package governance
Freeze the certification boundary
Adopt the Tigrbl-native package shape
Direct FastAPI and Starlette imports are forbidden
Separate standards core from optional extensions
Release gates are defined as code
Generate OpenAPI and OpenRPC artifacts
Retain evidence and require peer review for Tier 4
Define the strict package boundary
Normalize standards labels and quarantine mis-scoped targets
Evidence bundles are required for tier promotion
Independent peer claims are a separate certification boundary
Remove vendor directories and forbid private framework shims
Tigrbl public-API-only composition is mandatory in release paths
Feature flags and profile gating are release-governed surfaces
Installable surfaces and partial feature consumption are first-class boundaries
Runtime planes own one concern each
ADR-0018: Strict Partial Feature Disappearance
ADR-0019: Boundary Enforcement as Code
ADR-0020: Plugin and Gateway Composition Profiles
ADR-0021: Project tree and migration plan are certification artifacts
CLI metadata as the single source
Live contract generation and diff
Evidence bundles and peer profiles
Release bundles and recertification
ADR-0026 Browser Session, Cookie, and Logout Semantics
Runner profile certification
CLI operator surface is part of the certification boundary
Certification closeout boundary freeze
GitHub work items are mirrored in SSOT
Dependency maintenance is governed work
SSOT is the authoritative active document
